prompt: Present a leader to an audience with pride.
hint: Use respectful and proud language to introduce the leader.
sample: I could not be more proud tonight to present to you my father and our next president, Donald J. Trump.

zh.prompt: 自豪地向觀眾介紹一位領導者。
